item.title: Skills
item.description: Coding Languages: MATLAB SimuLink Python Computer Aided Drafting: SolidWorks Autodesk Fusion 360 Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing Manufacturing: Design for Manufacturability Machining Welding Hand Tools 3D Printing Laser Printing
